name: oww-maco
description: IoT machine authentication system - dev orchestration

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @oww/admin -w @oww/checkout && npm --prefix functions run build && npm --prefix checkout-kiosk run typecheck
scripts.dev: concurrently -n emu,checkout,admin -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:emulators" "npm run dev:checkout" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.test:web:integration: npx tsx scripts/port-block.ts -- bash -c 'scripts/emulator-exec.sh --config "$FIREBASE_E2E_CONFIG" --only firestore "cd web && npm run test:integration"'
scripts.test:web:e2e: npx tsx scripts/port-block.ts -- bash -c 'scripts/emulator-exec.sh --config "$FIREBASE_E2E_CONFIG" --only firestore,auth,functions,storage "cd web && npm run test:e2e"'
scripts.test:web:e2e:update-snapshots: npx tsx scripts/port-block.ts -- bash -c 'scripts/emulator-exec.sh --config "$FIREBASE_E2E_CONFIG" --only firestore,auth,functions,storage "cd web/apps/checkout && ../../node_modules/.bin/playwright test --update-snapshots && cd ../admin && ../../node_modules/.bin/playwright test --update-snapshots"'
scripts.test:all: npm run test:web && cd functions && npm test
scripts.test:precommit:web: npm run build:shared && cd web && npm run build && npm test && cd .. && npm run test:web:integration
scripts.test:precommit:functions: npm run build:shared && cd functions && npm test
scripts.test:precommit: npm run test:scripts && npm run test:precommit:web && npm run test:precommit:functions
scripts.deploy:functions:cleanup: git restore functions/package.json package-lock.json && rm -f functions/oww-shared-*.tgz && rm -rf functions/node_modules/@oww/shared
